name: yare-panel
description: YARE Panel - Universal Server Management Platform

scripts.setup: npm install && cd apps/frontend && npm install
scripts.build:backend: cd apps/backend && go mod tidy && go build -o bin/yare-backend main.go
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && node scripts/copy-dist.js && npm run build:backend
scripts.build:win: npm run build:frontend && node scripts/copy-dist.js && cd apps/backend && go mod tidy && set CGO_ENABLED=0 && set GOOS=windows && go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o ../../yare-panel.exe main.go

author: YARE Panel Team
